message:
fix: Add runtime memory pressure checking for server mode

The optimizer profiles calculate GPU layers with 75% memory cap,
but other processes (IDE, Claude Code, etc.) consume the headroom.

Now server mode checks current memory before loading:
- If pressure is high/critical: reduce GPU layers by 50%
- If available < needed: scale GPU layers proportionally
- Context size also scales to match reduced GPU capacity

This prevents the GPU OOM crash that was freezing the system.
